assertions.scriptName: json_agg DISTINCT rejects json inputs without equality
assertions.query:
SELECT json_agg(DISTINCT doc)::text
						FROM (VALUES ('{"a":1}'::json), ('{"a":1}'::json)) AS v(doc);

assertions.scriptName: json_object_agg DISTINCT rejects json inputs without equality
assertions.query:
SELECT json_object_agg(DISTINCT key, doc)::text
						FROM (VALUES ('a', '{"x":1}'::json), ('a', '{"x":1}'::json)) AS v(key, doc);

assertions.scriptName: jsonb_agg DISTINCT deduplicates jsonb inputs
assertions.query:
SELECT jsonb_agg(DISTINCT doc)::text
						FROM (VALUES ('{"a":1}'::jsonb), ('{"a":1}'::jsonb)) AS v(doc);

assertions.scriptName: json extraction preserves subdocument text
json extraction preserves object key order
json_each preserves plain json object order and duplicate keys
json_each preserves plain json object order and duplicate keys
json_object_keys preserves plain json object order and duplicate keys
assertions.query:
SELECT string_agg(key, ',')
						FROM json_object_keys('{"b":1,"a":2}'::json) AS key;

assertions.scriptName: json_object_keys preserves plain json object order and duplicate keys
assertions.query:
SELECT string_agg(key, ',')
						FROM json_object_keys('{"a":1,"a":2}'::json) AS key;

assertions.scriptName: json aggregates preserve plain json input text
json aggregates preserve plain json input text
json_to_record preserves nested plain json field text
assertions.query:
SELECT nested::text
						FROM json_to_record('{"nested":{"b":1,"a":2}}'::json) AS r(nested json);

assertions.scriptName: json_to_record preserves nested plain json field text
assertions.query:
SELECT nested::text
						FROM json_to_record('{"nested":{"a":1,"a":2}}'::json) AS r(nested json);

assertions.scriptName: json_populate_record preserves nested plain json field text
json_populate_record preserves nested plain json field text

jsonb_object_agg rejects non-scalar keys
jsonb_object_agg rejects non-scalar keys
assertions.query: SELECT jsonb_object_agg(r, 2) FROM (SELECT 1 AS a, 2 AS b) AS r;

assertions.scriptName: json_object accepts two-dimensional text array
assertions.query:
SELECT json_object('{{a,1},{b,2},{3,NULL},{"d e f","a b c"}}'::text[])::jsonb::text,
						jsonb_object('{{a,1},{b,2},{3,NULL},{"d e f","a b c"}}'::text[])::text;

assertions.scriptName: json_object two-dimensional text array requires two columns
json_object two-dimensional text array requires two columns
json_object two-dimensional text array requires two columns
json_object two-dimensional text array requires two columns
json_object two-array form rejects multidimensional inputs
json_object two-array form rejects multidimensional inputs
json_object two-array form rejects multidimensional inputs
json_object two-array form rejects multidimensional inputs
to_json non-finite floats become strings
assertions.query:
SELECT to_json('NaN'::float8)::text,
						to_json('Infinity'::float8)::text,
						to_json('-Infinity'::float8)::text,
						to_jsonb('NaN'::float8)::text,
						to_jsonb('Infinity'::float8)::text,
						to_jsonb('-Infinity'::float8)::text;

assertions.scriptName: json builders convert non-finite floats to strings
plain json float negative zero preserves spelling
to_json multidimensional array preserves nesting
to_json date and timestamp values use PostgreSQL formatting
json builders date and timestamp values use PostgreSQL formatting
to_json record conversion preserves field order
assertions.query:
SELECT to_json(r)::text,
						row_to_json(r)::text,
						to_jsonb(r)::text
						FROM (SELECT 1 AS b, 2 AS a) AS r;

assertions.scriptName: jsonb comparison uses PostgreSQL type precedence
jsonb_path_match maps JSON null to SQL null
jsonb_path_match rejects non-boolean results
jsonb_path_query_array applies filter predicates
JSONPath accepts PostgreSQL 16 numeric literal syntax
jsonb containment matches nested array elements
jsonb array containment uses PostgreSQL containment semantics
jsonb object containment uses PostgreSQL containment semantics
jsonb_set empty path replaces whole document
jsonb_set empty path update replaces stored document
jsonb_set_lax empty path replaces whole document
jsonb existence operators decode escaped string values
jsonb_set rejects scalar targets
jsonb_set array path elements must be integers
jsonb_insert rejects scalar targets
jsonb_insert rejects existing object keys
jsonb path extraction null path element returns null
jsonb subscript reads and updates stored document
jsonb subscript reads and updates stored document
jsonb delete operator updates stored document
jsonb_insert updates nested arrays
jsonb_set_lax delete_key updates stored document
